scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix server && npm ci --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix server && npm run format --prefix client && prettier --write "README.md" ".github/**/*.yml" "tests/**/*.js"
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --prefix server && npm run format:check --prefix client && prettier --check "README.md" ".github/**/*.yml" "tests/**/*.js"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
